Q: im learning induction | A: Induction is a method for proving statements that say **“for all natural numbers \(n\) …”**.

## 1) The basic idea (domino picture)

Q: induction | A: Mathematical induction is a **systematic method to prove statements of the form**:

\[
\forall n \ge n_0,\; P(n)
\]

where \(P(n)\) is a predicate (a claim depending on a natural number \(n\)).

Q: induction | A: Mathematical induction is a **systematic method to prove statements of the form**:

> “For all natural numbers \(n\ge n_0\), \(P(n)\) is true.”
